pi_items.source: Task instructions in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh verification logic
Task instructions in setup_task.sh asking for 'Obstructive sleep apnea (adult)(pediatric)'
NLM Clinical Tables API confirms G47.33 as a standard real-world ICD-10-CM code.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding the real ICD-10-CM code 'G47.33' with the description 'Obstructive sleep apnea (adult)(pediatric)'. The code and description match the official standard ICD-10-CM specifications.
